items.definition_en: A ferry is a boat that carries people or vehicles across water.
items.example_en: We took a ferry to the island.

items.definition_en: A canoe is a light boat that you move using a paddle.
items.example_en: They went fishing in a canoe.

items.definition_en: A kayak is a small boat moved with a double-ended paddle.
items.example_en: She learned how to paddle a kayak.

items.definition_en: A rowboat is a small boat that you move with oars.
items.example_en: We rented a rowboat at the lake.

items.definition_en: A yacht is a large boat for pleasure or sport.
items.example_en: They sailed their yacht along the coast.

items.definition_en: A barge is a large flat boat used for carrying heavy things.
items.example_en: The barge carried coal down the river.

items.definition_en: A sailboat is a boat that moves using sails and wind.
items.example_en: We saw a sailboat on the lake.

items.definition_en: A dinghy is a small open boat, sometimes with a motor.
items.example_en: They used a dinghy to reach the shore.

items.definition_en: A catamaran is a boat with two parallel hulls.
items.example_en: We enjoyed a ride on the catamaran.

items.definition_en: A speedboat is a fast boat with a motor.
items.example_en: He drove a speedboat across the bay.

items.definition_en: A raft is a flat structure used to float on water.
items.example_en: They built a raft from logs.

items.definition_en: A cruise ship is a large ship for travelling on holiday.
items.example_en: Our holiday was on a big cruise ship.

items.definition_en: A fishing boat is used for catching fish on water.
items.example_en: The fishing boat came back with lots of fish.

items.definition_en: A submarine can travel under water.
items.example_en: The submarine disappeared beneath the waves.

items.definition_en: A houseboat is a boat with a place to live in.
items.example_en: They live on a houseboat all year.

items.definition_en: A jet ski is a small water vehicle for fun.
items.example_en: We rented a jet ski at the beach.

items.definition_en: A paddle boat moves when you turn its pedals with your feet.
items.example_en: They enjoyed riding a paddle boat on the lake.

items.definition_en: A tugboat helps move other boats in the water.
items.example_en: The tugboat pulled the big ship to the dock.

items.definition_en: A life raft is a small boat used in emergencies.
items.example_en: They used the life raft after the ship accident.

items.definition_en: A sailing ship is a big ship that moves with sails.
items.example_en: We toured an old sailing ship in the harbor.
